global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a prominent logo and call-to-action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to play a game and win rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: StormByte logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized text logo reading 'StormByte' in a prominent position at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Epic rewards message
elements.description: A clear, large text message stating 'Win epic rewards' centered in the ad.

elements.label: Play with friends
elements.description: A smaller text line below the main message that reads 'Play with friends tonight'.

elements.label: Game interface
elements.description: A grid-like layout with empty circles, suggesting a game interface, positioned in the center.

elements.label: Try for free button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element at the top right corner of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element in the center bottom of the ad.

elements.label: StormByte headline
elements.description: The main headline 'StormByte' in large, bold text at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: A large text message in the center of the ad that communicates the main offer.
elements.text_content: Win epic rewards Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Try for free
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button at the bottom of the ad inviting users to try the game for free.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, playable, bright and playful, StormByte logo, epic rewards message, call-to-action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by the main message in the center, and the call-to-action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: StormByte, Win epic rewards, Play with friends tonight, Try for free
